entities.description: pcie2 0 is a technology interface that requires specific design considerations for signal and power requirements
ac     is a product used for ac coupling in pcie2 0 interfaces  with specific recommendations for packaging and performance
0201   is a product packaging type recommended for ac     to achieve lower esr and esl
clkreqn is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that must be connected to a functional pin and cannot be replaced by gpio
waken is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that must be connected to a functional pin and cannot be replaced by gpio
m0 is a technology configuration option that must be selected for clkreqn and waken signals
m1 is a technology configuration option that must be selected for clkreqn and waken signals
m2 is a technology configuration option that must be selected for clkreqn and waken signals
perstn is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that can be connected to a functional pin or gpio
prsnt is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces for add incard insertion detection  which can be connected to gpio
sata usb30 is a technology module that cannot be used when pcie2 0 functionality is being used
rk3588 is a product used for pcie30      with specific data line and control signal connection requirements
txp txn is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that should be left floating if pcie2 0 functionality is not used
rxp rxn is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that should be left floating if pcie2 0 functionality is not used
refclkp refclkn is a technology signal used in pcie2 0 interfaces that should be grounded or left floating if pcie2 0 functionality is not used
phy is a technology component that requires the refclkp n signals to be sourced from the same clock generator
slot is a technology component that requires specific design considerations for refclkp n signals

relations.description: ac     is used in pcie2 0 interfaces for ac coupling  with specific packaging recommendations
clkreqn is a signal in pcie2 0 interfaces that must be connected to a functional pin and cannot be replaced by gpio
waken is a signal in pcie2 0 interfaces that must be connected to a functional pin and cannot be replaced by gpio
clkreqn must be selected with  m0 or  m1 or  m2  not mixed
waken must be selected with  m0 or  m1 or  m2  not mixed
perstn can be connected to a functional pin or gpio  and must be in the same group as clkreqn and waken
prsnt is a signal in pcie2 0 interfaces for add incard insertion detection  which can be connected to gpio
sata usb30 cannot be used when pcie2 0 functionality is being used
rk3588 uses txp txn signals for pcie30      with specific data line connections
rk3588 uses rxp rxn signals for pcie30      with specific data line connections
rk3588 uses refclkp refclkn signals for pcie30      with specific grounding or floating requirements
phy requires refclkp refclkn signals to be sourced from the same clock generator
slot requires refclkp refclkn signals to be sourced from the same clock generator
